mapper.select: SELECT * FROM chat_message WHERE (sender_id = #{userId} AND receiver_id = #{friendId}) OR (sender_id = #{friendId} AND receiver_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM chat_message WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
